node.statement: NODE N0 (STARTING POINT): H_full = T_e + V_ee + V_e-ion + V_ion-ion + H_e-phonon + H_SO + H_B, where T_e = sum_i p_i^2/(2m_e), V_ee = (1/2)sum_{i!=j} e^2/(4*pi*eps_0*|r_i-r_j|), V_e-ion = sum_{i,I} V_crystal(r_i - R_I), H_B = sum_i (e/c)A(r_i).p_i + e^2A^2/(2m_e c^2). This is the complete non-relativistic QED Hamiltonian for ~10^11 electrons/cm^2 in a crystal. No one solves this. [P11-Girvin Sec 1.1]
